title: Contracts and policies not affected
doc_html:
§2465. Contracts and policies not affected

            The legal effectiveness, validity, or enforceability of any contract or policy of insurance executed by a party shall not be denied solely because of the failure of the insurer to obtain electronic consent or confirmation of consent of the party in accordance with the provisions of this Chapter.

            Acts 2018, No. 132, §1.
doc_text:
§2465.  Contracts and policies not affected
The legal effectiveness, validity, or enforceability of any contract or policy of
insurance executed by a party shall not be denied solely because of the failure of the insurer
to obtain electronic consent or confirmation of consent of the party in accordance with the
provisions of this Chapter.
Acts 2018, No. 132, §1.
